creator: astralblue@usa.net
text:
The port collection is missing this great port of TiK, a Tcl/Tk
version of AOL Instant Messenger (AIM). :-)

Fix: 

Attached is the shar'ed port file; extract it from /usr/ports.
	Thanks!
